name: infai-tech/vulnfeed-mcp
description: Dependency vulnerability scanner with EPSS exploit probability scoring. Scans lockfiles (npm, pip, Go, Cargo, Ruby, Composer, Gradle, NuGet, Mix), prioritizes by real-world exploit likelihood, recommends fix versions. 9 MCP tools for scanning, monitoring, and alerting. Free tier + x402 micropayments. `pip install vulnfeed-mcp`.
